subject: Re: Emailing: IMG_1261, IMG_1258, IMG_1259, IMG_1260
body:
repair it.. don't beat him up.. iot's not his fault


----- Original Message ----
From: Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com>
To: "Epstein, Jeffrey" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Sunday, November 12, 2006 2:18:10 PM
Subject: Fw: Emailing: IMG_1261, IMG_1258, IMG_1259, IMG_1260


Valdson took the car to 'get more supplies' for the house and was hit by a cyclist. I had him send me pics which are attached. I told him to take the car to merc to get an estimate of time to repair the damage. I also told him not to take the car out again w/out my permission and to take cabs if he needs to pick up supplies...


G
                

-----Original Message-----
From: Valdson COTRIN <valdson.cotrin@free.fr>
Date: Sun, 12 Nov 2006 22:13:18 
To:Ghislaine <gmax1@mindspring.com>
Subject: Emailing: IMG_1261, IMG_1258, IMG_1259, IMG_1260

madame bonjour.
voici les photos de la voiture les degas n'est sont pas tres visible 
mais il a la l'aile avant droite un petit peux le parechoc  ainsi qui la 
porte.
respectueusement.
valdson.our files are attached and ready to send with this message.
